phrases.intent_en: Can I hire a guide at the base?
phrases.cultural_note: Guide hire is a stable service, but exact base location unspecified.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, guides are available at the base.

responses.english: Yes, guides are available at the base.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Tomb of Amyntas entrance?
phrases.cultural_note: Site is spread across a hillside; staff use terse directions.

likely_response.translation_en: Go up to the large rock tomb above.

responses.english: Go up to the large rock tomb above.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy boat tour combo tickets?
phrases.text_local: Tekne turu kombine biletleri nereden alınır?
phrases.cultural_note: Combo tickets may be sold by third-party sellers nearby.

likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, from the ticket booth.

responses.english: At the entrance, from the ticket booth.

phrases.intent_en: Can I hire a guide at the base?
phrases.cultural_note: Licensed guides often approach visitors near the ticket area.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, guides wait at the base.

responses.english: Yes, guides wait at the base.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Tomb of Amyntas entrance?
phrases.text_local: Tomb of Amyntas’a çıkan merdivenler nerede başlıyor?
phrases.cultural_note: The exact entrance point is not specified in the venue context; default to safety.

likely_response.translation_en: It starts from the right of the entrance.

responses.english: It starts from the right of the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Are there rules for photographing inside?
phrases.text_local: İçeride fotoğraf çekme kuralları var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Rules can vary by tomb; site staff are the best source.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy boat tour combo tickets?
phrases.text_local: Tekne turu kombine biletlerini nereden alabilirim?
phrases.cultural_note: Combo tickets are mentioned but no fixed sales point is specified.

likely_response.translation_en: From the agencies at the harbor side.

responses.english: From the agencies at the harbor side.
